T0018.title: Instant Sellout
T0018.definition: A homophone for 'gone in seconds,' describing a scenario in e-commerce where limited-edition or popular items sell out instantly during pre-order or flash sale events.
T0018.description: A homophone for 'gone in seconds,' describing a scenario in e-commerce where limited-edition or popular items sell out instantly during pre-order or flash sale events.
T0018.usageExample: 那个限量球鞋刚上架就秒无，肯定又是被那群用外挂的扫光了。
